raw_text:
```json
{
  "claim_texts": [
    "The Hollywood Film Tax Credit is designed to strengthen and modernize California's film and television industry.",
    "Governor Gavin Newsom proposed increasing the Film & TV Tax Credit Program to $750 million annually.",
    "The entertainment industry in California once accounted for over 200,000 direct jobs and billions of dollars in economic activity.",
    "Other states and countries have adopted competitive film and television tax incentives that have lured jobs and productions away from California.",
    "California's film tax credit program has been oversubscribed every year since its launch in 2009.",
    "Limited tax credit funding and growing competition from other states and countries have resulted in lost production spending and job losses in California.",
    "Each tax dollar approved through the Film & Television Tax Credit Program generates a return of $24.40 in output.",
    "The program generates $16.14 in GDP for every tax dollar approved.",
    "Each approved tax dollar results in $8.60 in wages.",
    "The Film & Television Tax Credit Program generates $1.07 in state and local tax revenue for every dollar approved."
  ]
}
```
